arts.ttl: Liverpool confirm squad for AC Milan clash as Federico Chiesa decision made
arts.sum: Liverpool include Federico Chiesa in their 23-man travelling squad for their Champions League opener away to AC Milan on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: AC Milan boss outlines difference in Arne Slot's Liverpool to Jurgen Klopp side
arts.sum: Paulo Fonseca is hoping to mastermind a win for Italian giants AC Milan against Liverpool in the Champions League - but knows his side have their work cut out

arts.ttl: Report: £16m player who Jurgen Klopp loved is now being linked with January exit from Liverpool

arts.ttl: Name the starting XI: AC Milan 1-2 Liverpool - 2021
arts.sum: Play now Name the starting XI: AC Milan 1-2 Liverpool - 2021 Aiming to become the first English club to win all six group-stage matches, the Reds prevailed 2-1 on a night when former manager Jürgen Klopp mixed up his team.

arts.ttl: Liverpool make Federico Chiesa Champions League decision as AC Milan squad confirmed
arts.sum: Liverpool returned to Champions League after last year's absence and will start their European campaign with an away game

arts.ttl: Fonseca demands Milan perfection vs. Liverpool
arts.sum: AC Milan manager Paulo Fonseca said on Monday that his team will have to be perfect defensively when they host Premier League side Liverpool in their Champions League opener at San Siro.

arts.ttl: I don't care what anyone says - I could smell things were going wrong for Liverpool
arts.sum: In his latest column, John Aldridge admits Liverpool's shock loss to Nottingham Forest has already put them under pressure in the Premier League
